param_mismatches.name: BI_ASort
param_mismatches.comment: Returns the sorted array by all the columns  in the order entered. Useful for sorting Countrywise, Regionwise, Statewise, Citywise etc.,

param_mismatches.name: BI_AltmanZScore
param_mismatches.comment: Calculates Altman Z Score. Use BI_AltmanZScoreVariables() function to list the variables.

param_mismatches.name: BI_AnovaSingleFactor
param_mismatches.comment: Calculates Anova (Analysis of Variance) Single Factor. This is one of the Data Analysis Toolpak features.

param_mismatches.name: BI_AnovaTwoFactorsWithoutReplication
param_mismatches.comment: Calculates Anova (Analysis of Variance) without replication. This is one of the Data Analysis Toolpak features.

param_mismatches.name: BI_ArrayContains
param_mismatches.comment: Verifies whether one record of data contains in a table and returns true or false.

param_mismatches.name: BI_ArrayCountif
param_mismatches.comment: Counts howmany times a record of data repeated in a table of data. If not found returns 0.

param_mismatches.name: BI_ArrayFilter
param_mismatches.comment: Filters a Table for a multi-column criteria array by matching selected columns with the criteria array.

param_mismatches.name: BI_ArrayInArray
param_mismatches.comment: Filters only the available rows in an array found in another array.

param_mismatches.name: BI_ArrayMatch
param_mismatches.comment: Returns the row number of an array where a matching row is first found. Returns #NA if not found.

param_mismatches.name: BI_AttributeUnitCount
param_mismatches.comment: Returns Attribute Unit Sampling cumulative count of any attribute.

param_mismatches.name: BI_BeneishMScore
param_mismatches.comment: Calculates Beneish M Score. Beneish's M-Score is a mathematical model that uses eight financial ratios weighted by coefficients to identify whether a company has manipulated its profits.

param_mismatches.name: BI_BenfordLaw_FirstDigit
param_mismatches.comment: Returns Benford Law for the first digit of a data set.

param_mismatches.name: BI_BenfordLaw_FirstThreeDigits
param_mismatches.comment: Returns Benford Law for the first three digits of a data set.

param_mismatches.name: BI_BenfordLaw_FirstTwoDigits
param_mismatches.comment: Returns Benford Law for the first two digits of a data set.

param_mismatches.name: BI_BenfordLaw_LastTwoDigits
param_mismatches.comment: Returns Benford Law for the last two digits of a data set.

param_mismatches.name: BI_BenfordLaw_SecondDigit
param_mismatches.comment: Returns Benford Law for the second digit of a data set.

param_mismatches.name: BI_BenfordLaw_SecondOrder
param_mismatches.comment: Calculates Benford Law Second Order - Frequency, Actual and Expected values along with Mean Abstract Deviation.

param_mismatches.name: BI_BenfordLaw_SummaryTest
param_mismatches.comment: Calculates Benford Law Summary Test - Frequency, Actual and Expected values along with Mean Abstract Deviation.

param_mismatches.name: BI_BenfordLaw_ThirdDigit
param_mismatches.comment: Returns Benford Law for the third digit of a data set.

param_mismatches.name: BI_BottomN
param_mismatches.comment: Returns Bottom N ranked rows of a column of data.

param_mismatches.name: BI_BottomPercent
param_mismatches.comment: Returns Bottom N Percentage of Data

param_mismatches.name: BI_Consolidate
param_mismatches.lambda_params: Function, DataRange1, DataRange2, DataRange3, DataRange4, DataRange5, DataRange6, DataRange7, DataRange8, DataRange9, DataRange10
param_mismatches.comment: Multiple Consolidation Ranges

param_mismatches.name: BI_Contains
param_mismatches.comment: Returns true if FindText is found in WithinText.

param_mismatches.name: BI_Correlation
param_mismatches.comment: Returns a Correlation Table of many attributes. This is one of the Data Analysis Toolpak features.

param_mismatches.name: BI_Covariance
param_mismatches.comment: Returns a Covariance Table of many attributes. This is one of the Data Analysis Toolpak features.

param_mismatches.name: BI_DateDif
param_mismatches.comment: Returns Age in years, months, days etc.,

param_mismatches.name: BI_Describe
param_mismatches.comment: Returns the descriptive statistics of Data.

param_mismatches.name: BI_DiscountedPayback
param_mismatches.comment: Returns the Discounted Payback period for a series of cashflows

param_mismatches.name: BI_EMISchedule
param_mismatches.comment: Returns EMI Schedule of a loan

param_mismatches.name: BI_EndsWith
param_mismatches.comment: Returns whether one text ends with another text.

param_mismatches.name: BI_ExactArray
param_mismatches.comment: Compares two arrays and returns whether both the arrays are equal.

param_mismatches.name: BI_ExponentialSmoothing
param_mismatches.comment: Returns Exponential Smoothened data after applying Damping Factor. This is one of the Data Analysis Toolpak features.

param_mismatches.name: BI_ExtractNumbers
param_mismatches.comment: Extracts all the numbers from a text string.

param_mismatches.name: BI_ExtractText
param_mismatches.comment: Extracts all the characters from a  text string excluding numbers.

param_mismatches.name: BI_FDRSchedule
param_mismatches.comment: Returns the Fixed Deposit Schedule of Interest calculations and maturiy value.

param_mismatches.name: BI_FillDown
param_mismatches.comment: Fills down blank cells with the content above.

param_mismatches.name: BI_FinancialYear
param_mismatches.comment: Returns  the financial year (1st April to 31st March) of any date.

param_mismatches.name: BI_FinancialYearEnd
param_mismatches.comment: Returns  the financial year end (31st March) of any date.

param_mismatches.name: BI_FinancialYearStart
param_mismatches.comment: Returns  the financial year start (1st April) of any date.

param_mismatches.name: BI_FindDuplicates
param_mismatches.comment: Returns duplicate values from a list

param_mismatches.name: BI_FindMissingNumbers
param_mismatches.comment: Returns missing numbers from a list of numbers

param_mismatches.name: BI_FindOneOf
param_mismatches.comment: Returns the position of the first specified character value in a string. If the specified value is not found, 0 is returned. CaseWare IDEA inspiration.

param_mismatches.name: BI_FindUnique
param_mismatches.comment: Returns the values available only once (without duplicates) in a list.

param_mismatches.name: BI_FormulaList
param_mismatches.comment: Returns the formula list in the specified range.

param_mismatches.name: BI_Fuzzy
param_mismatches.comment: Returns the number of modifications required to change from first text to second text. This finds Levenshtein distance between two strings.

param_mismatches.name: BI_GEL1Test
param_mismatches.comment: Calculates Gestalt Element Link Test between two columns of related data like Salesman and Customer

param_mismatches.name: BI_GEL2Test
param_mismatches.comment: Calculates Gestalt Element Link Test 2 between two columns of related data like Salesman and Customer for a particular dataitem.

param_mismatches.name: BI_GenerateRandom
param_mismatches.comment: Function to generate static random numbers between 0 and 1 using a Random Seed. This is one of the Data Analysis Toolpak features.

param_mismatches.name: BI_GenerateRandomBetween
param_mismatches.comment: Function to generate static random numbers between two numbers using a Random Seed. This is one of the Data Analysis Toolpak features.

param_mismatches.name: BI_Histogram
param_mismatches.comment: Function to create Histogram analysis. This is one of the Data Analysis Toolpak features.

param_mismatches.name: BI_IndianNum2Word
param_mismatches.comment: Returns the Indian spelling of a number. (Maximum 16 digits)

param_mismatches.name: BI_Insert
param_mismatches.comment: Inserts a sub-string into Character field or string before a specified position.

param_mismatches.name: BI_IsCharAtoZ
param_mismatches.comment: Verifies whether the character is an alphabet from a to z.

param_mismatches.name: BI_IsLeap
param_mismatches.comment: Returns whether the year of a date is a leap year

param_mismatches.name: BI_IsValidPAN
param_mismatches.comment: Function to validate Indian Income Tax PAN

param_mismatches.name: BI_LuhnAlgorithm
param_mismatches.comment: Uses Luhn Algorithm to test the validity of Credit/Debit Card Numbers

param_mismatches.name: BI_MUS_Evaluate_OverStatement
param_mismatches.lambda_params: Data, Sample, Audited, Tolerable, Expected, Risk
param_mismatches.comment: Returns Monetary Unit Sampling evaluation of Over Statement from the Audited and Samples data.

param_mismatches.name: BI_MUS_Evaluate_UnderStatement
param_mismatches.lambda_params: Data, Sample, Audited, Tolerable, Expected, Risk
param_mismatches.comment: Returns Monetary Unit Sampling evaluation of Under Statement from the Audited and Samples data.

param_mismatches.name: BI_MUS_ExtractSample
param_mismatches.comment: Returns Monetary Unit Sampling Samples from Data.

param_mismatches.name: BI_MUS_SampleSize
param_mismatches.comment: Returns Monetary Unit Sample size.

param_mismatches.name: BI_MonthlyCalendar
param_mismatches.comment: Returns the monthly Calendar

param_mismatches.name: BI_MovingAverage
param_mismatches.comment: Returns the moving average calculation of data. This is one of the Data Analysis Toolpak features.

param_mismatches.name: BI_NetworkDays.Indian
param_mismatches.comment: Returns the number of whole work days between two dates considering Indian banking holidays (second and fourth Saturdays as holidays).

param_mismatches.name: BI_Num2Word
param_mismatches.comment: Returns the English spelling of a Number

param_mismatches.name: BI_OhlsonsOScore
param_mismatches.comment: Calculate Ohlsons O Score

param_mismatches.name: BI_PaybackPeriod
param_mismatches.comment: Returns the payback period from series of cash flows

param_mismatches.name: BI_PiotroskiFScore
param_mismatches.comment: Calculates Piotroski F-score. Use BI_PiotroskiFScoreVariables() to list the variables and enter two years data

param_mismatches.name: BI_Pivot
param_mismatches.comment: Creates a Pivot Table from Data.

param_mismatches.name: BI_Quarter
param_mismatches.comment: Returns the Quarter number for a date.

param_mismatches.name: BI_QuarterEnd
param_mismatches.comment: Returns the Quarter ending date.

param_mismatches.name: BI_QuarterStart
param_mismatches.comment: Returns the Quarter Starting date.

param_mismatches.name: BI_Rank.Dense
param_mismatches.comment: Returns the Rank without any missing rank when there is a tie.

param_mismatches.name: BI_Regression
param_mismatches.comment: Calculates the Linear Regression. This is one of the Data Analysis Toolpak features.

param_mismatches.name: BI_RelativeSizeFactor
param_mismatches.comment: Returns the Relative Size Factor of given data on any attribute.

param_mismatches.name: BI_ReverseText
param_mismatches.comment: Returns the text in reverse order.

param_mismatches.name: BI_RoundNumbersTest
param_mismatches.comment: Returns the Round numbers test in data.

param_mismatches.name: BI_RowOccurence
param_mismatches.comment: Returns how many times the same complete row or selected columns occurs in the data.

param_mismatches.name: BI_RunningTotal
param_mismatches.comment: Returns Running Total of Data

param_mismatches.name: BI_SLNSchedule
param_mismatches.comment: Returns Straight Line Method of Depreciation Schedule.

param_mismatches.name: BI_SameSameSameTest
param_mismatches.comment: Returns Same values in the given columns (like invoice number, supplier id, employee id). Useful in forensic audit.

param_mismatches.name: BI_SubsetNumberDuplicationTest
param_mismatches.comment: Calculates the Subset Number Duplication Test.

param_mismatches.name: BI_Summary
param_mismatches.comment: Returns Summary of data according to any attribute.

param_mismatches.name: BI_TextSplitByPositions
param_mismatches.comment: Returns an array of text split by number of positions as in Power Query.

param_mismatches.name: BI_TopN
param_mismatches.comment: Returns Top N ranked rows of a column of data.

param_mismatches.name: BI_TopPercent
param_mismatches.comment: Returns Top N Percentage of Data

param_mismatches.name: BI_Unpivot
param_mismatches.comment: Returns unpivoted data

param_mismatches.name: BI_UnpivotExceptFirst
param_mismatches.comment: Unpivot Except First Column

param_mismatches.name: BI_WDVSchedule
param_mismatches.comment: Returns Written Down Value (Declining Balance) Method of Depreciation Schedule.

param_mismatches.name: BI_WordCount
param_mismatches.comment: Returns the number of words in text.

param_mismatches.name: BI_WorkDay.Indian
param_mismatches.comment: Returns the date after a specified number of Indian workdays (Second and Fourth Saturdays as holidays)

param_mismatches.name: BI_YearlyCalendar
param_mismatches.comment: Returns the Yearly Calendar of any date or current date in horizontal or vertical format.

param_mismatches.name: BI_ZScore
param_mismatches.comment: Returns the Z Score of data.
